since_last: 59% of 101 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +1.55%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 59% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.21% · BTC +0.53% · Gold +0.18% · Nasdaq100 -1.87%. 59% of 101 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +1.55%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +1.55%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -0.65%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SAP is the standout at +6.24%
cards.body: Leaders: SAP +6.24%, NVT +5.66%, INTC +3.60%, NET +2.98%, ORCL +2.73%. Laggards: SKHY -2.77%, NXPI -2.02%, CEVA -1.96%, AMBA -1.80%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.58% at $116.37
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.58% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
